game_name: Space Quest III: The Pirates of Pestulon

sub_pixel_system.notes: SCI0 engine used; no sub-pixel precision data documented

special_mechanics.name: Astro Chicken Minigame
special_mechanics.description: Arcade minigame where player lands a chicken on a trampoline. Mechanics similar to Lunar Lander with gravity/descent physics. Chicken rebounds unharmed if landing too forcefully.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Qualitative data only. Source is Wikipedia article focusing on plot, gameplay overview, and development. No specific physics values documented. Game uses SCI0 engine with mouse-based movement system where Roger stops when encountering barriers (primitive pathfinding). Movement mechanics not quantified in available sources.
